world.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
world.summary: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.

world.title: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks
world.summary: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.

world.title: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
world.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.

world.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
world.summary: Nobody was seriously hurt as a result of the accident in the Spanish town, local authorities say.

tech.title: The new Sonos Play has become my go-to desk and kitchen speaker
tech.summary: The new Sonos Play can act as a portable speaker inside and outside your home.

tech.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
tech.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

tech.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
tech.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

tech.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
tech.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

denmark.title: Churches Offer Immediate Marriages on June 26th
denmark.summary: Churches in Denmark will offer immediate marriages on June 26th, allowing couples to get married quickly.

denmark.title: Israel Attacks Hizbollah Targets in Beirut
denmark.summary: Israel has launched attacks on Hizbollah targets in Beirut, escalating tensions in the region.

denmark.title: Switzerland Rejects Balloon Release Due to Population Projections
denmark.summary: Switzerland has rejected a proposal to release balloons into the air due to concerns over population projections.

denmark.title: Storm and Multiple Arrests During Knicks Victory Celebration in New York
denmark.summary: A storm and multiple arrests occurred during the celebration of the Knicks' victory in New York.

greece.title: Ένα βήμα πριν από την υτουραφή συμτητικας ΗΠΑ με Ιράν – «Αγκάθι» η ισραλινή επιτεση στη νότια Βηρυτό
greece.summary: Μόνο οι υτουραφές μένουν, σύμφωνα με τον Ντόναλλδ Τραμπ, για σιγήσουν τα όπλα στον Περσικό και να αρχίσουν οι συνοςλής για τα καλιστώντα θέφματα που οδήσαν στη σρλαςη Ηπλιμένών Πολιτειών και Ιράν.

greece.title: Η επιστροφή του Έμπολα και τα μαθήματα για την επόμενη πανδημία
greece.summary: Το 1976, ο Ζαν-Ζακ Μουγιέμπε, ένας νεαρός επιδημιολόγος από το Κονγό, στάλθηκε να διερευνήσει μια μυστηριώδη ασθένεια που εάχε εμφανιστεί στο τροπικό δάσος κοντά σε μια καθολιώα 41

sports.title: Τζένιφερ Λόπεζ: Πανηγύρισε έξαλλα την κατάκτηση του πρωταθλήματος από τους Νικς
sports.summary: Από τις celebrities στην άλλη άκρη του Ατλαντικού που πανηγύρισε έξαλλα την κατάκτηση του πρωταθλήματος από τους Νικς ήταν και η Τζένιφερ Λλόπεζ.

sports.title: F1: Ο Χάμιλτον πήρε στη Βαρκελώνη την πρώτη του νίκη με τη Ferrari
sports.summary: Ο Λούις Χάμιλτον πανηγύρισε μια συγκλονιστιώική επικράτηση στη Βαρκελώνη, εκμεταλλευόμενος την τολμηρή στρατηγιώική της Ferrari - Εγκατέλειψε ο Κντολιλι.
